name: HTS_SCHEDULE_SHIFT_DETAILS
description: Table holding the detailed information about the shifts scheduled for employees within a department or an unit.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key. System generated unique identifier for the Schedule Shift Detail.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key. Identifier for the Schedule Shift, to which this detail belongs to.

columns.Name: START_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the start date and time of the shift detail.

columns.Name: END_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the end date and time of the shift detail.

columns.Name: SHIFT_DETAIL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the particular type of shift detail, as defined.

columns.Name: SHIFT_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the calendar date of the scheduled shift.

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Indicates the duration specified for the element pertaining to the shift detail, in minutes.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Indicates the origin of creation for the shift detail.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
